common.tagline: Your Navigator to the Dream Job

hero.title: Find Your Dream Job in Hessen
hero.subtitle: JobPilot connects job seekers with top employers in Wiesbaden, Frankfurt, and all of Hessen. With personal guidance and AI-powered matching.

features.title: Why JobPilot?
features.subtitle: We are more than a job board — we are your partner on the way to your new career.

jobMatching.title: Smart Job Matching
jobMatching.description: Our AI analyzes your profile and finds matching positions in the Hessen region — automatically and accurately.

coaching.title: Personal Coaching
coaching.description: Professional guidance for applications, resumes, and interviews — also in cooperation with the Employment Agency.

network.title: Strong Network
network.description: Access exclusive job offers from top employers in Wiesbaden, Frankfurt, and the Rhine-Main area.

support.title: Full Support
support.description: From job search to your first day at work — we guide you through the entire application process.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We connect people with the right jobs — quickly, personally, and effectively. In close cooperation with the Employment Agency and regional companies, we build bridges between job seekers and employers in the Rhine-Main area.

footer.description: JobPilot — Your navigator to the dream job in Hessen. Job placement, career counseling, and coaching in Wiesbaden, Frankfurt, and the Rhine-Main area.
